name: mom-12-0-top5
rationale: Skip-month ablation, pre-registered: the canonical 12-1 skips the most recent month to dodge short-term reversal (Jegadeesh 1990). This spec includes that month (12-0) to test whether the skip is load-bearing on the modern point-in-time S&P 500 panel. Expectation from the literature is DEGRADATION versus 12-1; the experiment is registered because the expectation deserves a counted test, not an assumption -- a PASS would challenge the reversal premise on this panel. Registered before the result exists.
